Family First Home Visiting Program
Family First Home Visiting Program
What is Family First Home Visiting?
Family First Home Visiting Program is a free and confidential service to support local Plumas County residents with family health and wellbeing, offering valuable resources for family life.
A trained team of professionals will provide support and services during pregnancy, coaching parents on how to support children during growth and development, and connecting families to educational and community resources.
Please allow us to support you on your parenting journey.
Breastfeeding Education & Support

Services available in English and Spanish
“Home visiting for families in Plumas County helps to create a safe and nurturing environment in which to raise children and brightening the future.”
